name: [iam-jit] Burst-pattern alert detected
message:
An iam-jit Bounce burst-pattern rule fired in the last 5 minutes.

Burst patterns fire when many high-signal events landed in a short window (admin-fallback grants, denies against the high-risk-action watchlist). This is a 'look at this session' prompt — not a 'something bad happened' assertion. The matched rule name is in `@iam_jit.alert_pattern`.

Next step: open Logs view filtered to this session's `agent.session_id` for context.

@your-team-here
